languages.text: "Компаньон одного из моих спутников пришит тобой к чужому телу. Зачем?"
"You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"
languages.original_text: "Компаньон одного из моих спутников пришит тобой к чужому телу. Зачем?"

traits.locale_text: "You sewed one of my partner's companions to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"
"You sewed one of my partner's companions to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"
"You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"
"You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"
"You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"
"You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"

languages.text: "Ihr habt den Kollegen meines Gefährten in den Körper eines anderen genäht. Warum?"
languages.original_text: "You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt den Kollegen meines Gefährten in den Körper eines anderen genäht. Warum?"

languages.text: « Vous avez greffé le collègue de l'un de mes compagnons au corps de quelqu'un d'autre. Pourquoi avez-vous fait ça ? »
languages.original_text: "You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez greffé le collègue de l'un de mes compagnons au corps de quelqu'un d'autre. Pourquoi avez-vous fait ça ? »

languages.text: «Has cosido al colega de mi compañero a otro cuerpo. ¿Qué pretendías conseguir con eso?».
languages.original_text: "You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"

traits.locale_text: «Has cosido al colega de mi compañero a otro cuerpo. ¿Qué pretendías conseguir con eso?».

languages.text: "Yoldaşımın meslektaşını başkasının bedenine diktin. Bunu neden yaptın?"
languages.original_text: "You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"

traits.locale_text: "Yoldaşımın meslektaşını başkasının bedenine diktin. Bunu neden yaptın?"

languages.text: “你把我同伴的同僚缝到了别人身上？你为什么要这么做？”
languages.original_text: "You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"

traits.locale_text: “你把我同伴的同僚缝到了别人身上？你为什么要这么做？”

languages.text: 「あなたは私の仲間の同僚を他人の体にくっつけた。なぜそんなことをしたのか？」
languages.original_text: "You sewed my companion's colleague to someone else's body. Why would you do that?"

traits.locale_text: 「あなたは私の仲間の同僚を他人の体にくっつけた。なぜそんなことをしたのか？」
